characters.name: Arya Stark
characters.title: No One
characters.description: Youngest daughter of House Stark who trains with the Faceless Men. Arya becomes a deadly assassin and eventually returns to Westeros to take revenge on her enemies.

characters.name: Jon Snow
characters.title: King in the North
characters.description: Raised as the illegitimate son of Ned Stark, Jon joins the Night’s Watch and rises to become Lord Commander. He later plays a key role in the battle against the White Walkers.

characters.name: Sansa Stark
characters.title: Queen in the North
characters.description: Eldest Stark daughter who survives the dangerous politics of King’s Landing. Over time she becomes a strong and wise ruler of the North.

characters.name: Jaime Lannister
characters.title: Knight of the Kingsguard
characters.description: A famous knight known for killing the Mad King. Although initially arrogant, Jaime develops a complex moral journey and seeks redemption.

characters.name: Cersei Lannister
characters.title: Queen of the Seven Kingdoms
characters.description: Powerful and ruthless queen determined to maintain control of the Iron Throne. She will do anything to protect her children and power.

characters.name: Tyrion Lannister
characters.title: Hand of the Queen
characters.description: Highly intelligent and witty member of House Lannister. Despite facing prejudice for his dwarfism, Tyrion becomes one of the most capable political minds in Westeros.

characters.name: Bran Stark
characters.title: The Three-Eyed Raven
characters.description: After losing the ability to walk, Bran discovers his supernatural powers as the Three-Eyed Raven, allowing him to see the past, present, and future.

characters.name: Daenerys Targaryen
characters.title: Mother of Dragons
characters.description: Last known heir of the Targaryen dynasty. Daenerys rises from exile to become a powerful ruler commanding dragons and armies in her quest to reclaim the Iron Throne.
